message:
feat(python): add weighted graph/digraph projection helpers for multigraph algorithm dispatch

Add WeightedGraphProjection and WeightedDiGraphProjection enums that
provide a unified interface for algorithms to work with both simple
and multi-graph types. For multigraphs, the projection selects the
minimum-weight parallel edge per node pair, matching NetworkX semantics
for shortest-path algorithms.

Also adds weighted_undirected_projection() and weighted_digraph_projection()
methods to GraphRef for transparent multigraph-to-simple-graph conversion
when weight attributes are involved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+import franken_networkx as fnx
+g = fnx.DiGraph()
+g.add_edge("a", "b", weight=1.0)
+g.add_edge("b", "c", weight=2.0)
+print("nodes:", g.nodes)
+print("edges:", g.edges)
+print(fnx.multi_source_dijkstra(g, ["b"], weight="weight"))
+print(fnx.single_source_dijkstra(g, "b", weight="weight"))

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+import franken_networkx as fnx
+g = fnx.DiGraph()
+g.add_edge("a", "b", weight=1.0)
+g.add_edge("b", "c", weight=2.0)
+print(g.successors("b"))
+print(g.predecessors("b"))
